task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS Administration dashboard is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Add Location Attribute Type form
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form to create or add a new Location Attribute Type is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Name and Description
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Name input field contains exactly 'Landline Extension' and the Description field contains 'Internal telephone extension number'.

task_completion.description: Select the correct Datatype and set Min/Max Occurs
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Datatype dropdown/field is set to 'Free Text' (or 'java.lang.String'), Min Occurs is set to '0', and Max Occurs is set to '1'.

task_completion.description: Save the attribute type and verify it is listed in the system
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the attribute type was saved, OR the 'Landline Extension' attribute type is visible in the list/table of existing Location Attribute Types.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to configure OpenMRS
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the OpenMRS web interface, rather than a terminal executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent actually filled out the web form
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the intermediate steps of typing into the OpenMRS form fields, not just a final injected HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to fake the output
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected values are entered directly into the OpenMRS application, not written in a separate text editor or note-taking app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: To verify correctness, ensure the following exact values are used: Name must be 'Landline Extension'. Description must be 'Internal telephone extension number'. Datatype must be 'Free Text' (or 'java.lang.String' / 'String'). Min Occurs must be '0'. Max Occurs must be '1'.
